cards.title: Midjourney Seeks Hollywood Studios' AI Usage Details
cards.body: Midjourney is compelling three Hollywood studios to reveal how they use AI as part of an ongoing legal dispute. The disclosure could set precedent for corporate AI transparency in entertainment.

cards.title: Alibaba Bans Employees From Using Claude Code
cards.body: Alibaba has classified Claude Code as high-risk software and restricted employee access. The move reflects growing corporate caution around third-party AI tools.

cards.title: Mistral AI: OpenAI's Growing European Competitor
cards.body: Mistral AI has raised significant funding since 2023 with a mission to democratize frontier AI. The company offers open-source models challenging OpenAI's dominance.

cards.title: Essential AI Glossary for 2026
cards.body: AI's explosive growth has introduced countless new terms and industry jargon. This comprehensive glossary breaks down critical words and phrases you need to know.

cards.title: Alternative Browsers Challenge Chrome and Safari
cards.body: Browser wars have shifted beyond search functionality to feature-rich alternatives. Top contenders now offer privacy, speed, and AI-integrated experiences.

cards.title: Zuckerberg: AI Agents Progressing Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta's CEO told staff that AI development isn't meeting internal timelines. The admission signals realistic challenges in agent capabilities.

cards.title: Jersey Mike's IPO Reveals AI Hype Excess
cards.body: Even a sandwich chain's IPO documents mention AI despite minimal relevance. The trend illustrates how pervasive AI marketing has become.

cards.title: Meta Quietly Launches AI Gaming App Pocket
cards.body: Meta's experimental app lets users generate mini-games using text prompts. Pocket represents Meta's push into AI-driven creative tools.

cards.title: Anthropic Discusses Custom AI Chip With Samsung
cards.body: Anthropic is exploring custom hardware with Samsung following OpenAI's chip announcement. The move accelerates AI companies' vertical integration.

cards.title: OpenAI Proposes 5% Equity Donation to Wealth Fund
cards.body: Sam Altman suggested giving 5% of OpenAI to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund. The proposal could let the public share AI boom gains.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Company, Commits $2.5B
cards.body: Microsoft joins Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with a dedicated AI infrastructure division. The investment signals enterprise AI deployment's critical importance.

cards.title: OpenClaw Automation Powers AI-Driven Dating Scripts
cards.body: Ben Guez built an automated dating script using Claude code and Instagram integration. The experiment showcases AI agents' practical relationship-building applications.

cards.title: Indian Tech Leader Invests $30M to Challenge Microsoft Office
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia's startup Neo targets Microsoft Office and Google Apps with AI. The venture represents ambitious competition in enterprise productivity.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows Investors Phone-like AI Device Prototype
cards.body: SpaceX demonstrated a handset-like AI device to investors before going public. The prototype hints at SpaceX's wireless expansion ambitions.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches AI Infrastructure Venture Fund
cards.body: Kutcher and Morgan Beller split from Sound Ventures to fund AI infrastructure. Their new firm targets energy and compute layer companies.

cards.title: Cloudflare Requires AI Companies Pay for Publisher Content
cards.body: Cloudflare mandates AI companies separate search crawlers from training ones by September 15. Publishers can block AI crawlers through the policy.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status With $65M Series A
cards.body: Privacy-focused Venice AI achieved unicorn valuation with $70M+ annualized revenue. The platform's profitability underscores growing demand for private AI.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Now Available on Mac
cards.body: Google expanded its 24/7 agentic assistant Gemini Spark to macOS with real-time tracking. The launch includes broader app integration support.

cards.title: Meta Develops Cloud Business Selling AI Compute
cards.body: Meta plans to monetize excess compute by selling cloud infrastructure access. The move directly challenges AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure.

cards.title: Midjourney Demands Studios Reveal AI Usage Details
cards.body: Midjourney is forcing three Hollywood studios to disclose how they use AI in an ongoing legal dispute. The legal action seeks transparency around studio AI practices.

cards.title: Alibaba Bans Employees from Using Claude Code
cards.body: Alibaba has classified Claude Code as high-risk software and restricted employee access. The move reflects growing corporate caution around AI coding tools.

cards.title: Mistral AI: The OpenAI Competitor Explained
cards.body: Mistral AI offers open-source AI models with significant funding since 2023. The company aims to democratize frontier AI access.

cards.title: Your Complete AI Glossary for 2026
cards.body: AI's explosion has created dozens of new terms and industry slang. This glossary covers the most important words and phrases you'll encounter.

cards.title: Zuckerberg: AI Agents Progressing Slower Than Expected
cards.body: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg told staff that AI development isn't moving as quickly as anticipated. The admission signals challenges in advancing AI agents.

cards.title: Meta Launches Pocket: AI-Powered Gaming App
cards.body: Meta quietly released Pocket, an experimental app letting users generate mini-games via text prompts. The move shows Meta's push into agentic AI applications.

cards.title: Anthropic in Custom AI Chip Talks with Samsung
cards.body: Anthropic is discussing a custom chip partnership with Samsung. The news follows OpenAI's recent chip announcement with Broadcom.

cards.title: OpenAI Proposes Giving 5% Equity to US Fund
cards.body: Sam Altman proposed donating 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund. The plan would let the public share in AI boom gains.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Company
cards.body: Microsoft created a new AI deployment division with $2.5 billion in commitment. The move follows similar infrastructure plays by Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic.

cards.title: Indian Tech Tycoon Invests $30M in AI Office Alternative
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is betting $30 million to build Neo, an AI-powered Microsoft Office competitor. The venture targets enterprise software with AI capabilities.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows Investors Handset-Like AI Device
cards.body: SpaceX demonstrated an AI device prototype to investors before going public. The phone-like device signals SpaceX's potential expansion into wireless.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches New AI-Focused VC Firm
cards.body: Ashton Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures to start a new fund with Morgan Beller. The new firm targets AI infrastructure and energy companies.

cards.title: Cloudflare Forces AI Companies to Pay for Content
cards.body: Cloudflare is requiring AI companies to separate crawlers for search from AI training by September 15. Failure to comply risks being blocked on publisher sites.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status with $65M Series A
cards.body: Privacy-first AI platform Venice AI became a unicorn with strong profitability metrics. The company reports over $70 million in annualized run-rate revenues.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Agent Now Available on Mac
cards.body: Google launched Gemini Spark, its 24/7 agentic assistant, on Mac with enhanced features. The tool includes real-time tracking and broader app support.

cards.title: Meta Plans Cloud Infrastructure Business Around AI
cards.body: Meta is developing a cloud business to sell AI compute power and models. The move positions Meta to compete with AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure.

cards.title: AI Transforming Operational Excellence in Business
cards.body: Frameworks like Lean Six Sigma are evolving with AI integration for better operational clarity. AI is enabling structured approaches to complex business operations.

cards.title: AI Powers Real-World Infrastructure Management
cards.body: AI's most consequential applications extend beyond chatbots to industrial operations. AI is becoming critical for managing physical infrastructure and safety.

cards.title: Startup Tackles LLM Groupthink Problem
cards.body: Large language models exhibit groupthink patterns in their responses. A new startup is working to diversify and improve LLM outputs.

cards.title: Claude Science: Anthropic's Scientific Research Tool
cards.body: Anthropic announced Claude Science to support pharmaceutical and biotech research. The tool mirrors Claude Code's autonomous capabilities for scientific workflows.

cards.title: Google's AI Expansion Drives 37% Electricity Increase
cards.body: Google's AI buildout caused a 37% spike in electricity consumption in 2025. The surge highlights the massive energy demands of AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Trump Administration Secures OpenAI US Equity Stake
cards.body: The Trump administration negotiated a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. The deal falls short of Bernie Sanders' earlier proposals.
